ValidationRule.description: Enforces that Project Status and Stage are logically aligned. Planning/Active projects must not be in Closure. Completed projects must be in Closure.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Closure'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Planning'), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Closure')), AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Active'), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Closure')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Status and Stage are misaligned. Completed projects must be in Closure stage. Planning/Active projects cannot be in Closure.
